goal: Stabilize the testing gate and complete legacy src_new archive convergence by fixing test TypeScript module settings and committing tracked src_new deletions as an explicit archive step.
constraints: Do not delete gameplay/content assets; only handle tracked legacy src_new source-tree removal and test pipeline config.

deliverables: npm test runs successfully in current repository environment.
Tracked src_new files are removed from git in a dedicated convergence step.
Baseline/knowledge docs reflect src_new archive status and test gate expectations.
